description: Avoma is an AI meeting assistant with conversation intelligence that records and summarizes calls, automates CRM updates, and surfaces coaching and deal insights.
tagline: AI meeting assistant and conversation intelligence
overview: Avoma records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings, automates CRM updates and follow-ups, and adds conversation intelligence, coaching, and forecasting for revenue teams.
what_is: Avoma is an AI meeting assistant that handles note-taking, scheduling, coaching, and revenue intelligence in one tool. It automates work like follow-up emails and CRM updates, so teams capture more from each meeting without juggling separate apps.

It is strongest for sales, customer success, and operations teams that want real-time meeting insight, call scoring, and risk alerts. Plans scale from basic note-taking up to fuller revenue intelligence, so teams can start small.

Avoma integrates with calendars, conferencing, dialers, CRMs, and collaboration tools. It focuses on meeting intelligence and revenue insight rather than general project management or acting as a CRM.
